issuers.label: kolm demo issuer
issuers.note: Signs the public sample report on /verify only. NOT a production evidence signer. A report signed by this key is recognized as a kolm demo, never as production-issued evidence.

issuers.label: kolm production issuer
issuers.note: Production evidence signer for kolm.ai. A report whose embedded key matches this entry is kolm-issued production evidence, signed by the live audit service.
